description: Payoneer is a financial services platform for cross-border business payments, including receiving funds, holding multi-currency balances, and sending payouts. It serves businesses, marketplaces, and independent professionals with payment collection and global disbursement tools.
summary: Payoneer exposes two documented developer HTTP API surfaces: the Mass Payouts & Services REST API and the PSD2 Open API, both using OAuth2 bearer tokens derived from Payoneer-issued application credentials.
